lore_sanctum_1.speaker: LORE STONE
pages: The Vale did not build this place. It remembered it, and the memory sank.

lore_sanctum_2.speaker: LORE STONE
pages: Three trials, three answers. The Wheel turns even under water.

lore_sanctum_3.speaker: LORE STONE
pages: Past this hall sits the one who writes the Vale's forgetting.
A stair winds down into drowned dark, but the way is sealed stone.
Something below is still holding its breath.
The Hollow has drained. The stair waits, patient as ink.

trial_done.speaker: TRIAL STONE
pages: The stone is satisfied. It hums an old, settled note.
The chamber is quiet. The script on the walls has nothing left to say.
